CustomField.formula: AND ( ISPICKVAL(TaskCategory__c , "見積照会"), OR ( ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "本駐神電社シ一一計"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "神電社シ一二計"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[水環境BU・官需BU]本プラ・都公建"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[水環境BU・官需BU]本プラ・広公建"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[水環境BU・官需BU]本プラ・施設建"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[水環境BU・官需BU]本プラ・東北建"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[水環境BU・官需BU]北支・プラ建・建設"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[水環境BU・官需BU]中部支・プラ建・建設"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[水環境BU・官需BU]西支・プラ建・建設一"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[水環境BU・官需BU]西支・プラ建・建設二"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[水環境BU・官需BU]九支・プラ建・建設課"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[官需BU]神電社会営"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[施設BU]神電社会営"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[水環境BU・官需BU]長電施設営"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[施設BU]長電施設営"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[官需BU]配電社会営"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[施設BU]配電社会営"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "配電スマ営"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[施設BU]本プラ・施設建"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[施設BU]本プラ・東北建"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[施設BU]北支・プラ建・建設"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[施設BU]中部支・プラ建・建設"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[施設BU]西支・プラ建・建設一"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[施設BU]西支・プラ建・建設二"), ISPICKVAL(RequestTo__c, "[施設BU]九支・プラ建・建設課") ) )
CustomField.label: 対象製作所_見積照会
